scope: Google Search Console only (last-28d snapshot + 17-snapshot trend, 2026-05-07 to 2026-06-10) cross-referenced with the 67-keyword master list. Competitor #1-blocker and AI-visibility sections remain manual and are intentionally not auto-generated.
wins: Core local terms hold the top of page 1: 'bariatric counseling san antonio' at #1 and 'bariatric surgery counseling san antonio' at #1; 'weight loss counseling san antonio' at #2-3 and 'emotional eating therapy san antonio' at #2-3.
Strongest mover with real volume: national 'bariatric counseling' jumped +19 positions to #6.5 on 17 impressions, pulling it onto page 1.

Blog content is the impression engine: the hydration post sits at position 5.7 with 2,218 impressions and 11 clicks, and the weight-loss-medications (Wegovy/Ozempic/Zepbound/Mounjaro) post draws 1,870 impressions at position 9.4.
Distribution holds 8 tracked terms inside the top 10 (2 at #1, 2 at #2-3, 4 at #4-10).
needs_attention: Keyword coverage: 18 of 67 tracked KEYWORDS show GSC impressions; 49 show none. This is a keyword count, NOT a page count, and many keywords share one page. Most staging-targeted tracker URLs are stale pointers to pages already live on www (tracker hygiene, not lost traffic), so the coverage gap is largely a matching/hygiene issue rather than missing content.

Visibility drifted down over the window: impressions fell from 2,447 (2026-05-07) to 1,741 (2026-06-10) and impression-weighted avg position worsened from 14.87 to 18.55. Coverage also ticked from 19 to 18 keywords vs the 2026-06-08 run.
CTR is near zero: 5 clicks on 1,741 impressions (~0.3%), with high-impression blog posts carrying most impressions but few clicks.

Commercial/national terms slipped with real impressions: 'nutrition counseling' fell -59 to #71 (11 impressions), 'weight loss counseling' -11 to #56 (4 imp), 'holistic approach to weight loss' -12 to #52. CAVEAT: most ranked terms here sit on a single impression, so day-to-day positions swing wildly and are directional only.
priority_actions: Tracker hygiene first: repoint the 21 staging/old-slug targetUrls in keywords-master.json to their correct live www URLs (a 2026-06-03 sitemap check found 15 of 21 staging slugs already live verbatim on www and 4 live under a different slug) so GSC can match and coverage reflects reality.
Fix CTR by converting impressions to clicks: add internal links and clear CTAs from the high-impression hydration and weight-loss-medications blog posts into the matching San Antonio service pages.
Defend the core local #1-#3 terms (bariatric counseling / bariatric surgery counseling / weight loss counseling / emotional eating therapy San Antonio) with on-page freshness so they don't slip.
On-page refresh for the slipped national terms (nutrition counseling, weight loss counseling, holistic weight loss) — these are large negative deltas with non-trivial impressions.

Add FAQ schema to high-impression service/blog pages for rich-result and AI-overview eligibility. If a staging->prod publish backlog matters, confirm the real push list via a staging-vs-prod sitemap diff or Daniel's notes rather than inferring a count.
summary: Core local San Antonio terms remain strong (two #1s, eight tracked terms in the top 10) and national 'bariatric counseling' broke onto page 1 (+19 to #6.5), but overall visibility softened this window (impressions 2,447->1,741, avg position 14.87->18.55) and CTR is ~0.3%. The top priority is tracker-URL hygiene plus internal links/CTAs from high-impression blog posts into service pages; coverage of 18/67 is a keyword count, not a page count.
